surveys.comment: sales person seemed to be in a rush. and spoke very fast ....but did a good job!
i appreciate the fact that i can come to the store i schererville and pay my bill. the employees are very kind and helpful.
excellent customer service
good service
fast service
deshawn gave great customer service friendly quick and thorough with a smile
was returning equipment.  was in and out of store in less than 5 minutes.  no waiting, no problems.
the price has been very competitive compared to other isp's, and the associate at the store was able to get my phone line set up in a good timely manner.
very nice employee
austin was very professional and made it easy for me to pay my bill.

day was very helpful and personable. he was able to help me save some money by activating deals i didn’t know i had. he was polite and able to explain to me the activations going on. very great customer service from him.
good service but too expensive
i shouldn’t have to go into a specific store about 20 minutes away to pay my bill but unfortunately it’s the only way i can pay because the app or over the phone keeps denying my payment

the person i was working with—i believe his name is cash or at least pronounced that way,  was extremely helpful and explained the equipment and offered up plans to save money.  evanston illinois store

1. i feel like i was lied to about bundles on store. when i checked my app it said my monthly bills were going to be $165 when i was told it’d be $75. over the phone they were able to get my bills lowered but also told me that what they had told me in store wasn’t true and it was not a bundle. after the phone call i got 29 text messages in a 4 minute window wanting me to approve a $280 order that i did not want or order so i never approved it. i still am not sure exactly wha tht services are, what i will owe, and feel like my entire experience has been extremely difficult when all i wanted was simple wifi. i will never recommend xfinity to anyone and once i don’t have to have it as my service will drop it immediately
the young man that helped us in the store was very knowledgeable and helpful!

i feel like xfinity is a scam. you promise that your bill's going to be cheaper but it's never and my signal is constantly going in and out all the time. i can't even complete a video call anymore. the staff itself is fantastic and the people that you have working for you are wonderful, but the corporatism is just too much
fast and easy service
quick and easy, informative and kind customer service

i don’t trust comcast. it is a sneaky, overpriced and dishonest utility.

did not listen to my concern regarding a 3rd party vendor not locating our underground utilities accurately.  very poor communication.
because connor was good about explaining everything to my mom & i. and he answered the questions that we had.
he was not the one i asked for but he was very up to date on what he should do.  thank you.
quick exchange, no hassle. the person helping seemed to be new, but was honest about his experience and a more experienced associate helped him get my exchange handled quickly.
good visit

the gentlemen who assisted me with what i needed was very kind and knowledgeable in their job. atmosphere was great, several people were being helped in the store. from what i seen, customers were pleased with the service all in all.

my was prompted and very helpful and friendly.

when i entered the store and told the employee that i needed to pickup some equipment, he immediately tried to get me to sign up for the cell service that is included as a bonus for 1 year. i told him that i was not interested and that i just wanted to pickup the internet modem. he then proceeded to say that the internet plan price would go up if i didn’t and that i only have 14 days to sign up.
they were very helpful and eager to get me the help i needed.
the staff was courteous and knowledgeable.
always very helpful and willing to work with me to solve the problem.

the staff was very patient y knowledgeable about the proffered products.  one thing i don't enjoy is that xfinity makes it so difficult to access a spouse's account when it's shared!!!!  not the fault of the clerks.   please ease the process!!

i cancelled my service. people at the store were very nice but not going to get me to keep my service

i went yesterday since i had gone before to ask if i can switch to you from verizon bringing my 5 lines with me to xfinity now and i was told that i was good to go with no down payment but since i still had to stay with verizon for 2 months i had to wait but i still went ahead and got the internet and one line which they had told me it was going to be free but at the end i had to pay $20 because it was an ipad which ok i let that go and now when i went yesterday to transfer my 5 i also asked about getting new phones for at least 3 lines and when i was there i was given a different amount of credit for 2 of them and asked for a breakdown and was told that i had to wait for the trade ins and when i got home and checked my bank account i saw a deduction of $556 which to me was ridiculous so i went back today to get a breakdown and the same guy said that i forgot my receipt which was a lie since i asked for 1 yesterday and at the end it was a $300 difference and was told to call corporate and see if i can get credited the difference and now i’m thinking of returning everything and going to another provider which it’s still in the window to return everything.
the person who helped me was polite,personable, knowledgeable and not overbearing.
the xfinity assistant was very helpful in what i needed to have done and he helped me change providers. he was very kind and patient
